g.text: 🔑 Key Insight: Derivative Depends on Output, Not Input

div.p: The derivative formula uses tanh(x) — the output value — not x directly. This means during the backward pass, we only need the cached forward output t:
We do NOT need to recompute tanh(x) from scratch!

text.tspan: # Uses cached t from forward pass
# Uses cached t from forward pass
